channel.title: Brazil Elections 2026
channel.description: Real-time monitoring of the 2026 Brazilian presidential elections.

item.title: Bolsonaro é levado para hospital após sofrer calafrios e vômitos, diz Flávio
item.description: Former president Jair Bolsonaro is being taken to the hospital after experiencing chills and vomiting, according to his son, Senator Flávio Bolsonaro, in a post on X. He is serving a sentence at the Papudinha complex in Brasília for attempted coup d'État, as ruled by the STF.

item.title: Petrobras adere ao programa do governo para baratear o diesel
item.description: Petrobras announced its adherence to the federal program to reduce diesel prices, which includes PIS/Cofins tax exemptions and a 32-cent-per-liter subsidy, conditional on full pass-through to consumers. The measure aims to mitigate the impact of rising oil prices, driven by the U.S.-Iran war, on inflation and freight costs, in an election year marked by the Lula vs. Flávio Bolsonaro race.

item.title: Flávio diz que Bolsonaro foi encaminhado a hospital após vômitos e calafrios
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro (PL-RJ) stated he received news that his father, former President Jair Bolsonaro, was taken back to the hospital after waking up with chills and vomiting. The former president has been imprisoned at Papudinha since November 2024, serving a sentence for leading a coup plot following the 2022 elections. The information remains preliminary, according to the senator, who is a pre-candidate for president.

item.title: Flávio diz que Bolsonaro foi encaminhado a hospital após vômitos e calafrios
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro reported that former President Jair Bolsonaro, currently imprisoned in Papudinha, was returned to the hospital after experiencing chills and vomiting early Friday morning. The update, shared by Flávio around 08:14, raised concerns about the ex-president's health condition.

item.title: Como descobrir quem está usando seu Wi-Fi pelo celular e identificar aparelhos desconhecidos na rede
item.description: Suspicions of unauthorized Wi-Fi use may arise due to slow or unstable internet, even with few connected devices. Mobile apps allow users to check which devices are connected to the network and identify unknown ones, helping detect intrusions or unauthorized password sharing.

item.title: Decisão judicial alemã restringe acesso a mensagem de celular de investigados
item.description: Germany's Federal Court of Justice restricted investigators' access to mobile phone messages of suspects, setting limits on using such communications as evidence in criminal proceedings. The ruling aims to protect privacy rights amid growing reliance on digital data in investigations.

item.title: Flávio diz que Jair Bolsonaro foi levado ao hospital, após passar mal na prisão
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro reported that his father, former President Jair Bolsonaro, was taken to a hospital in Brasília after falling ill at the Papuda Penitentiary Complex, exhibiting vomiting and chills. He asked for prayers for his father's health, expressing hope that it is not serious.

item.title: Bolsonaro passa mal e volta a precisar de atendimento médico, diz Flávio
item.description: Former President Jair Bolsonaro fell ill on Friday (13) and required medical attention, according to his son, Senator Flávio Bolsonaro. He reportedly woke up with chills and vomited heavily, based on preliminary information. Bolsonaro is currently incarcerated at the Papudinha facility in Brasília, serving a 27-year and three-month sentence for attempted coup d'état.

item.title: Trump diz acreditar que novo líder supremo do Irã está “debilitado”
item.description: Donald Trump said he believes Iran's new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei — chosen after his father Ali Khamenei was killed in the U.S.-Israel war against Iran — is alive but debilitated, following injuries sustained on February 28 and no public appearances since. His first comments were read by a state TV presenter on March 12, while government sources and family confirmed his condition, including leg injuries and concealment for security reasons. Trump also reiterated his view that a war with Iran would be an 'easy victory' for the United States.

item.title: Bolsonaro é internado após apresentar calafrios e vômitos, diz Flávio
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro (PL-RJ) stated that former President Jair Bolsonaro was taken to the hospital after experiencing chills and vomiting episodes on Friday morning, the 13th. The announcement was made via his X account without further health details.

item.title: Flávio diz que Bolsonaro segue para hospital após sofrer calafrios e vômitos
item.description: Flávio Bolsonaro announced that his father, former President Jair Bolsonaro, is being taken to the hospital after experiencing chills and vomiting. The statement was made via a post on X (formerly Twitter) on Friday, March 13.

item.title: Junior Mano pediu a ministro de Lula que atuasse na Anac para liberar avião de Wesley Safadão
item.description: Federal Deputy Junior Mano, under investigation for leading a major corruption scheme in Ceará, requested Minister of Ports and Airports Silvio Costa Filho to authorize the release of two aircraft owned by singer Wesley Safadão through Anac for use in 2024 electoral campaigns. PF-obtained messages show the deputy used his privileged access to the Lula government to bypass state bureaucracy, aiming to use the plane for campaign travel by allied mayors, though no evidence confirms the minister acted on the request.

item.title: Notícias - Partido Novo
item.description: Romeu Zema, the presidential pre-candidate and governor of Minas Gerais from the Novo party, led a press conference with dozens of Novo leaders nationwide to file an impeachment request against Supreme Court Minister Alexandre de Moraes. The move is based on revealed messages between Moraes and banker Daniel Vorcaro, which the party claims demonstrate abuses in the Master Case. Novo argues these actions constitute crimes of responsibility and threaten democratic institutional independence.

item.title: PSD aciona STF contra regra para eleiçăo indireta no RJ
item.description: The PSD filed a Direct Action of Unconstitutionality (ADI) at the STF to challenge two points of the rule for indirect elections in Rio de Janeiro, sanctioned by Governor Cláudio Castro (PL). The party contests the constitutionality of the norms governing the indirect selection of offices in the state. The action was filed last night.

item.title: Alberto Cowboy vence a prova do líder no BBB26 e grita: ‘Vão ter que me engolir’
item.description: Alberto Cowboy won the leader's challenge in BBB26 by finding the prize phone in the final stage, after scoring the highest points (221) alongside Jonas and Jordana. He celebrated by shouting: 'You'll have to swallow me'.

item.title: Novo líder supremo do Irã promete seguir bloqueio no Estreito de Ormuz e 'vingar o sangue' dos iranianos mortos; o que aconteceu na guerra até agora
item.description: Iran's new supreme leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, vowed to maintain the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz as a pressure instrument and to avenge the blood of Iranians killed, citing a U.S. strike near a school in Minab that killed 168 people, including 110 children. He urged neighboring countries to close U.S. bases, stating Iran will continue attacking them. His message was read on Iranian state TV, though he has not appeared publicly since assuming office.

item.title: Prisão de Vorcaro: sem Toffoli, quatro ministros do STF decidem se mantêm banqueiro na cadeia
item.description: The Second Chamber of the STF is reviewing the preventive detention of banker Daniel Vorcaro, investigated in Operation Compliance Zero, following Justice Dias Toffoli's recusal. With only four justices voting (Gilmar Mendes, Luiz Fux, Nunes Marques, and André Mendonça), a tie is possible, which would trigger the 'in dubio pro reo' principle favoring the defendant. Expectations are that Fux will side with Mendonça to maintain the detention, while Gilmar may favor house arrest, leaving Nunes Marques as the swing vote.

item.title: Julgamento no TSE ameaça implodir acordo de Flávio Bolsonaro no Rio
item.description: The TSE ruling on Rio de Janeiro Governor Cláudio Castro (PL) has strained the political agreement with Senator Flávio Bolsonaro (PL), after Minister Antônio Carlos voted for Castro’s cassation, defying expectations. The reduction of the view request deadline to 15 days heightened Castro’s distrust of Kassio Nunes Marques — politically tied to Bolsonaro — and sparked discussions about advancing Castro’s incompatibilization to secure a seat at the State Audit Court (TCE-RJ) should he become ineligible.

item.title: Aviăo com 115 haitianos fica retido em SP; maioria tinha visto falsificado
item.description: Aviăo com 115 haitianos fica retido em SP; maioria tinha visto falsificado

item.title: Săo Paulo vence Chapecoense e assume liderança isolada do Brasileiro
item.description: Vasco da Gama overturned the score against Palmeiras with goals from Thiago Mendes and Cuiabano, after Argentine Flaco López had opened the scoring for the São Paulo side. The match marked the debut of coach Renato Gaúcho in charge of Vasco, which secured an important away victory.

item.title: Presidente do “SBT” pede desculpas a Erika Hilton por fala de Ratinho
item.description: Presidente do “SBT” pede desculpas a Erika Hilton por fala de Ratinho

item.title: Leia o decreto que obriga postos a informar descontos em combustíveis
item.description: Leia o decreto que obriga postos a informar descontos em combustíveis

item.title: Filmes nacionais tiveram reconhecimento em 2025, mas público dos cinemas caiu
item.description: Filmes nacionais tiveram reconhecimento em 2025, mas público dos cinemas caiu

item.title: Criativa, programaçăo do Belas Artes vai do Noităo ao Porăo, passando por Lacan, shows ao vivo e muito mais
item.description: Criativa, programaçăo do Belas Artes vai do Noităo ao Porăo, passando por Lacan, shows ao vivo e muito mais

item.title: Advogado diz que blogueiro alvo do STF é vítima de abuso e que caso não deveria tramitar na corte
item.description: Advogado diz que blogueiro alvo do STF é vítima de abuso e que caso não deveria tramitar na corte

item.title: Auxiliar de Abel detona gramado de São Januário após derrota: ‘Parece que plantaram batatas’
item.description: Auxiliar de Abel detona gramado de São Januário após derrota: ‘Parece que plantaram batatas’

item.title: Distribuidoras pedem mais importação de diesel pela Petrobras
item.description: Distribuidoras pedem mais importação de diesel pela Petrobras

item.title: Por que Alexandre de Moraes voltou atrás e proibiu visita de assessor de Trump a Bolsonaro
item.description: Por que Alexandre de Moraes voltou atrás e proibiu visita de assessor de Trump a Bolsonaro

item.title: MJ envia ao Itamaraty documento para pedir extradição do presidente do IVL
item.description: MJ envia ao Itamaraty documento para pedir extradição do presidente do IVL

item.title: Gleisi e Boulos divulgam vídeo que associa Flávio Bolsonaro a organizações criminosas do Rio
item.description: Gleisi e Boulos divulgam vídeo que associa Flávio Bolsonaro a organizações criminosas do Rio

item.title: Pesquisas que mostram empate entre Lula e Flávio servem de alerta, diz Boulos
item.description: Pesquisas que mostram empate entre Lula e Flávio servem de alerta, diz Boulos

item.title: Lula zera impostos sobre diesel em ano eleitoral
item.description: President Lula zeroed PIS and Cofins taxes on diesel on September 12, during an election year, to counter rising fuel prices driven by oil market volatility due to the war in Iran. The measure aims to alleviate inflationary pressure on transporters and consumers. The government states the decision is necessary to protect the economy amid international uncertainty.

item.title: “Depois taxam o Brasil e vão colocar na nossa conta”, diz Flávio
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro (PL-RJ) criticized a decision by Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes to deny senior Trump administration official Darren Beattie permission to visit former President Jair Bolsonaro at the official presidential residence, the Papudinha, in Brasília. Flávio claimed the move is part of an effort to 'tax Brazil and put the bill on our tab,' suggesting the STF is acting with bias and against national interests.

item.title: Rock in Rio anuncia J Balvin, Pedro Sampaio e mais 15 artistas; veja lista
item.description: Rock in Rio 2026 announced 17 new attractions for its edition, including J Balvin, Pedro Sampaio, and the K-pop group Nexz, which will make its debut in Brazil. The festival will take place from September 4 to 13 at Cidade do Rock, with highlights on September 7, 11, and 12 featuring major international and Brazilian artists. General ticket sales have not yet been announced after the Rock in Rio Card sold out.

item.title: Dirceu diz que PT aposta em alianças no Sudeste para garantir reeleição de Lula
item.description: Dirceu diz que PT aposta em alianças no Sudeste para garantir reeleição de Lula

item.title: OAB-MA manifesta preocupação com decisão do STF contra jornalista
item.description: The OAB-MA expressed institutional concern over the STF's decision authorizing search and seizure at the home of Maranhão journalist Luís Pablo Conceição Almeida, owner of the Blog do Luís Pablo, carried out on March 10, 2026. The commission stated the measure violates constitutional guarantees of freedom of expression and press, as well as source confidentiality, and noted that the STF itself has previously required heightened caution in operations against media professionals.

item.title: Combustíveis: Lula repete fórmula de Bolsonaro e reduz impostos para conter preços em meio à alta do petróleo
item.description: The Lula government zeroed PIS/Pasep and Cofins taxes on diesel and announced incentives for producers and importers to mitigate the impact of rising oil prices, at an estimated cost of R$30 billion, providing a R$0.64 per liter relief at the pump. The measure will be offset by increased export taxes on petroleum, aiming for fiscal neutrality, and comes amid inflationary pressures and ahead of the 2026 elections.

item.title: Lula está certo de limitar o estrago da guerra nos combustíveis, no curto prazo
item.description: Lula está certo de limitar o estrago da guerra nos combustíveis, no curto prazo

item.title: Mais de 4 mil brasileiros já retornaram de Dubai e Doha, diz Itamaraty
item.description: Mais de 4 mil brasileiros já retornaram de Dubai e Doha, diz Itamaraty

item.title: Lula recebe candidato de Petro e gera embaraço no Itamaraty
item.description: Lula recebe candidato de Petro e gera embaraço no Itamaraty

item.title: Flávio discursará em evento conservador que deve ter presença de Trump nos EUA
item.description: Flávio discursará em evento conservador que deve ter presença de Trump nos EUA

item.title: Moraes revê própria decisão e indefere visita de assessor de Trump a Bolsonaro
item.description: Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes reversed his prior decision and denied a visit by Darren Beattie, a Donald Trump advisor, to Jair Bolsonaro at the Papudinha residence. The denial was based on the lack of prior notification to Brazilian diplomatic authorities and the visit not falling within the diplomatic context that authorized Beattie’s visa, which was issued solely for a critical minerals conference and official government meetings. Bolsonaro remains detained at Papudinha since January 15, 2026, following his conviction for attempting a coup d'état.
